component.name: YASH Voice Bridge
component.summary: Terminal-based voice transcription sidecar for YASH

description.p: YASH Voice Bridge is a terminal-first Linux voice transcription sidecar for YASH. It captures live Pulse audio or replayed recordings, transcribes them locally with Whisper, and emits raw transcript lines for validation and future YASH IPC integration.
The application is intended to run in a terminal and does not provide a graphical interface. Packaged desktop metadata exists to improve AppImage integration for end users.
